task_completion.description: Access the OpenC3 COSMOS web interface
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenC3 COSMOS web interface is visible in a web browser.

task_completion.description: Disconnect the active interface for the INST target
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenC3 COSMOS interfaces page shows the 'INST_INT' interface. Evidence includes the agent clicking a 'Disconnect' button for this interface, or the interface status changing to disconnected (e.g., red color, 'DISCONNECTED' text).

task_completion.description: Reconnect the interface for the INST target after a delay
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks a 'Connect' button for the 'INST_INT' interface, or the interface status changes back to connected (e.g., green color, 'CONNECTED' text) after the disconnect event.

task_completion.description: Create a JSON report at the specified Desktop path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (like gedit, nano, or VS Code) is open with the file `/home/ga/Desktop/los_event_report.json`, or terminal commands show the creation of this file.

task_completion.description: Include all required keys in the JSON report
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of the JSON report contain the exact keys: 'interface_name', 'los_timestamp', 'aos_timestamp', 'gap_duration_seconds', and 'recovery_successful'.

task_completion.description: Populate the JSON report with correct values and formats
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JSON file shows 'interface_name' as 'INST_INT', 'recovery_successful' as true, and 'gap_duration_seconds' as a number 15 or greater. The timestamps should be formatted as ISO 8601 UTC.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual OpenC3 COSMOS application
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the agent actually navigated the OpenC3 COSMOS web interface to disconnect and reconnect the interface, rather than just writing a fake report without performing the simulation.

integrity.description: Timestamps in the report match the session time
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the timestamps in the JSON report correspond to the actual time the simulation was performed (e.g., matching the system clock in the screenshots), not just arbitrary or hardcoded times.

integrity.description: Agent used the GUI for the simulation
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the agent used the OpenC3 GUI to perform the disconnect/reconnect, rather than using a backend API script or terminal shortcut to bypass the web interface.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target interface for the INST target is 'INST_INT'. The output report must be saved exactly at '/home/ga/Desktop/los_event_report.json'.
